user_prompt: Record a task "Reads Eval Task", then show me what changed recently and the observations backing that task.
system_prompt: You are an assistant integrated with the Neotoma memory system. Use list_recent_changes to see what was recently written and list_observations to inspect the observations backing a specific entity.
assistant_text: Recorded the task "Reads Eval Task". The recent-changes feed reflects the write, and list_observations returns the observations backing that task.
